title: Banai (disambiguation)
content:
'''Banai''' could refer to the following two individuals:
==Canon==
*'''[[Kitster Banai]]''', [[Slavery|slave]] and childhood friend of [[Anakin Skywalker]].
==Legends==
*'''[[Kitster Chanchani Banai]]''', a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] and childhood friend of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].
*'''[[Rakir Banai]]''', his father and a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].
{{Disambig}}
